issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' not 'OnAttacked'. This is a static ability that grants Blocker when the card enters play, not a reactive effect to being attacked.
Condition is missing the {FILM} type check. Should be LeaderHasType with value 'FILM', not 'Always'.
Duration should be 'Permanent' not 'EndOfBattle'. Blocker is a static keyword ability that persists for the card's lifetime on the board.
